posts.text: While Europe may be too slow at handling problems, it is rarely the source of them. There is something to be said for a power that prefers rule books to rockets https://www.economist.com/europe/2026/03/04/in-times-of-chaos-europe-is-the-muddled-power-the-world-needs?taid=69ada66706b76700012bb0d7&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
BREAKING: Oil production in Iraq has now declined by 3 million barrels per day.

Production has declined from 4.3 million barrels per day to 1.3 million barrels per day.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
@MitoPsychoBio  and I started our "The Science and Experience of Energy" Substack not only to explore the science of energy, but to create a community where we can experience it together.

In our latest piece, we invite you to take a moment to simply be. 

Hopefully this weekend offered a chance to disconnect, but as you move through the hustle and bustle of the week, there may still be small moments in your day to pause: notice your mind, your body, and the environment around you, and briefly settle into your full conscious self.

Even in the middle of busy lives, there’s always a small moment to notice your own energetic state.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
